name: If partly at fault, does AI chat admitting it ruin my Dallas comparative negligence case?

mainEntity.name: If partly at fault, does AI chat admitting it ruin my Dallas comparative negligence case?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, discoverable admission shifts fault percentage against you.[1] Key factors: no privilege; used in deposition; overrides testimony.[1] Get accident reconstruction expert; focus on other party's breach; lawyer negotiates shares.[1] Avoid admissions anywhere.
